docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,373.32 FILED BY BENEFICIAL OF CALIFORNIA, INC.DBA BENEFICIAL CREDIT SERVICE . AS TO DEFENDANT WILKINS, DEANNA M. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-28-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 06

OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF DEC-23-1992, NO APPEARANCE, CONTINUED FOR LETTER FROM DEC-23-1992 TO JAN-06-1993 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 05 AS TO DEFENDANT WILKINS, DEANNA M.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT WILKINS, DEANNA M.
